## Meeting Purpose

[Close out StackBlitz project and align on final deliverables and off-boarding process.](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Ramping down plan**: Export GitHub repos, CSVs, notion docs; final strategy doc + checkout meeting](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Efficiency gains**: Marcel's streamlined process now takes \~30min for key deliverables (excl. calibration guide)](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**Client variability**: Addressing inconsistent customer experiences via strategist improvements](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**Payment check**: Ensure all deliverables are withheld until final payment is received](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### StackBlitz Project Wrap-up

  - [Deliver database schemas and two built repos/prototypes](https://fathom.video/share/E77fMZWytRS5xyp8Q2Lc-NXsuyTV84xW?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
